title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, dialog, Cancel
scenario: Guest user stuck in login loop when cancelling login from Support screen in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Install Poly Studio Mobile app and complete onboarding as a Guest.
2. Open the hamburger menu (three-line icon) on the Home screen.
4. Tap the 'App' button on the Support screen.
6. Observe the login dialog that appears with 'Cancel' and 'Continue' buttons.
expected: The user should be returned to the previous screen (Support screen) or the app should dismiss the login dialog and return to the Support screen.
